channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [RCL] Radhagobind Commercial Ltd's 5th COC Meeting Approves Resolution Plan Evaluation and Additional Support Service Cost
item.description:
The 5th meeting of the Committee of Creditors (CoC) of Radhagobind Commercial Limited was held on 21-03-2026. The meeting, chaired by Mr. Najeeb T P, the Interim Resolution Professional (IRP), discussed various matters related to the Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP). Key highlights include the acceptance of resolution plans received after the stipulated deadline, discussion on CIRP cost till date, and the requirement of additional support service cost for resolution plan evaluation. The meeting concluded at 5.48 pm.

  • Mr. Najeeb T P, the Resolution Professional, chaired the 5th COC meeting
  • Resolution plans received after the deadline were accepted
  • Discussion on CIRP cost till date and additional support service cost for resolution plan evaluation
  • Meeting concluded at 5.48 pm on 21-03-2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Radhagobind Commercial Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [VINDHYATEL] Vindhya Telelinks Ltd Approves Scheme of Amalgamation with Birla Cable Ltd
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Vindhya Telelinks Ltd has approved a scheme of amalgamation with Birla Cable Ltd at a Board Meeting held on March 21, 2026. The amalgamation is subject to necessary statutory and regulatory approvals, including the approval of the National Company Law Tribunal. The transaction is between related parties, but will be done at 'arm's length'. The share exchange ratio has been arrived at based on a report by RBSA Valuation Advisors LLP and GT Valuation Advisors Private Limited.

  • Vindhya Telelinks Ltd approves scheme of amalgamation with Birla Cable Ltd
  • Subject to necessary statutory and regulatory approvals
  • Transaction between related parties but will be done at 'arm's length'
  • Share exchange ratio based on report by RBSA Valuation Advisors LLP and GT Valuation Advisors Private Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VINDHYA TELELINKS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [KERALAYUR] Kerala Ayurveda Ltd. to Raise Funds Worth Rs. 40 Crores via NCDs
item.description:
Kerala Ayurveda Ltd. has informed the BSE that a Board meeting is scheduled on 25/03/2026 to consider and approve a proposal for fund raising by way of issue of Unlisted, Secured, Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) for a value up to Rs. 40 crores. The trading window for dealing in the Company's equity shares will be closed for designated persons with immediate effect and will be opened 48 hours after the board meeting. This information is also available on the Company’s website.

  • Kerala Ayurveda Ltd. to raise funds worth Rs. 40 crores
  • Fundraising through the issuance of Unlisted, Secured, Redeemable Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs)
  • Trading window closed for designated persons with immediate effect
  • Trading window to open 48 hours after the board meeting
  • Information available on the Company’s website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KERALA AYURVEDA LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [JONJUA] Jonjua Air Limited, Promoter Group, Sells Portion of Holding in Jonjua Overseas Limited
item.description:
Jonjua Air Limited, a Promoter Group, has sold a portion of its holding in Jonjua Overseas Limited on 20th March 2026. The disclosure of this transaction is attached and is in compliance with Regulation 29 (2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The sale resulted in a decrease in Jonjua Air Limited's holding from 9.18% to 7.06% of Jonjua Overseas Limited's total share and voting capital.

  • Jonjua Air Limited, a Promoter Group, sold a portion of its holding in Jonjua Overseas Limited on 20th March 2026.
  • The sale resulted in a decrease in Jonjua Air Limited's holding from 9.18% to 7.06% of Jonjua Overseas Limited's total share and voting capital.
  • The transaction is in compliance with Regulation 29 (2) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jonjua Overseas Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PPARIVAH] Paradeep Parivahan Ltd. Approves Allotment of Convertible Equity Warrants Worth Rs. 16,27,18,400/‐
item.description:
Paradeep Parivahan Ltd. announced the outcome of their Board Meeting held on March 21, 2026. The Board approved the allotment of 10,40,000 (Ten Lakhs Forty Thousand) Convertible Equity Warrants at an issue price of Rs. 156.46/‐ per warrant. The Company has received 25% of the issue price, i.e. Rs. 39.115/‐ per warrant, amounting to Rs. 4,06,79,600/‐. The Equity Shares to be allotted on exercise of the Warrants shall rank pari passu with the existing Equity Shares of the Company in all respects. The allotment is in accordance with the approval of the shareholders of the Company obtained through the Extra ordinary General Meeting and upon receipt of 25% of the issue price as application money.

  • Paradeep Parivahan Ltd. approved the allotment of Convertible Equity Warrants worth Rs. 16,27,18,400/‐.
  • The Company received 25% of the issue price, i.e. Rs. 4,06,79,600/‐, towards subscription of the warrants.
  • The Equity Shares to be allotted on exercise of the Warrants shall rank pari passu with the existing Equity Shares of the Company.
  • The allotment is in accordance with the approval of the shareholders of the Company obtained through the Extra ordinary General Meeting.
  • The warrants are convertible into Equity Shares at an issue price of Rs. 156.46/‐ per warrant.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Paradeep Parivahan Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [PASARI] Pasari Spinning Mills Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Q1 2026
item.description:
Pasari Spinning Mills Ltd, with scrip code 521080, has announced the closure of its trading window for the quarter ending 31.03.2026 in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company's Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading. The closure will begin on 1st April, 2026, and will remain in effect until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results for the quarter and year ending 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for approval of the financial results will be communicated in due course. Designated Persons and their immediate relatives are advised not to trade in the securities of the Company during the aforesaid period.

  • Closure of Trading Window from 1st April, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of Q1 2026 financial results
  • Trading Window closure in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and Company's Code of Conduct
  • The date of the Board Meeting for approval of financial results will be intimated later
  • Designated Persons and their immediate relatives advised not to trade in the Company's securities during the closure period
  • Pasari Spinning Mills Ltd Scrip Code: 521080

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PASARI SPINNING MILLS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PPARIVAH] Paradeep Parivahan Ltd Allots 10,40,000 Convertible Equity Warrants at Rs. 156.46 Each
item.description:
Paradeep Parivahan Limited has approved the allotment of 10,40,000 (Ten Lakhs Forty Thousand) Convertible Equity Warrants at an issue price of Rs. 156.46/‐ per warrant. The Company has received 25% of the issue price, i.e. Rs. 39.115/‐ per warrant, amounting to Rs. 4,06,79,600/‐. The Equity Shares to be allotted on exercise of the Warrants shall rank pari passu with the existing Equity Shares of the Company in all respects. The details of the allotment are provided in Annexure A.

  • Paradeep Parivahan Ltd allots 10,40,000 Convertible Equity Warrants
  • Issue price of Rs. 156.46 per warrant
  • Company has received 25% of the issue price
  • Equity Shares to rank pari passu with existing shares
  • Allotment details provided in Annexure A

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Paradeep Parivahan Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [PARKHOTELS] Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Director Acquires Shares Worth INR 19.88 Lakhs
item.description:
Ms. Priya Paul, Director and Promoter of Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd, has acquired 18,200 equity shares representing 0.00853% of the paid-up equity share capital of the company. The transaction was executed on the NSE, with the shares fully paid-up. The total value of the transaction was INR 19.88 lakhs.

  • Ms. Priya Paul, Director and Promoter, acquires 18,200 equity shares
  • Shares represent 0.00853% of the paid-up equity share capital
  • Transaction value is INR 19.88 lakhs
  • Shares fully paid-up
  • Transaction executed on the NSE

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [BIRLACABLE] Birla Cable Ltd. Announces Approval of Scheme of Amalgamation with Vindhya Telelinks Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Birla Cable Ltd. announced the approval of a Scheme of Amalgamation between itself and Vindhya Telelinks Limited at a Board Meeting held on March 21, 2026. The amalgamation will result in the dissolution of Birla Cable Ltd. The scheme is subject to necessary statutory and regulatory approvals, including the approval of the National Company Law Tribunal. The details of the scheme are provided in Annexure ‘A’.

  • Birla Cable Ltd. and Vindhya Telelinks Limited approved a Scheme of Amalgamation.
  • The amalgamation will result in the dissolution of Birla Cable Ltd.
  • The scheme is subject to necessary statutory and regulatory approvals.
  • The consideration for the amalgamation will be discharged on an arms’ length basis.
  • The share exchange ratio for the amalgamation has been arrived at based on a report by RBSA Valuation Advisors LLP and GT Valuation Advisors Private Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Birla Cable Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [PARKHOTELS] Director and Promoter of Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd Acquires Shares Worth 0.01267% of Paid-up Equity Share Capital
item.description:
Pursuant to Regulation 7(2)(b) of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd received a disclosure from Mr. Karan Paul, Director and Promoter of the company, regarding the acquisition of 27,042 equity shares representing 0.01267% of the paid-up equity share capital of the company. The transaction was executed on the NSE, and the shares were acquired on-market. The total value of the transaction was INR 19,89,471.4.

  • Mr. Karan Paul, Director and Promoter of Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd, acquired 27,042 equity shares representing 0.01267% of the paid-up equity share capital of the company.
  • The transaction was executed on the NSE and was an on-market purchase.
  • The total value of the transaction was INR 19,89,471.4.
  • The shares were acquired on 20th March 2026.
  • This is in accordance with Regulation 7(2)(b) of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd | Category: Investment
